title: The Moon and the Beast
overview: An herbivore's murder unsettles Cherryton Academy, with some suspecting grey wolf Legoshi. Dwarf rabbit Haru struggles with her classmates' bullying.

title: The Academy's Top Dogs
overview: Legoshi ponders his own ferocious impulses; an altercation at breakfast unsettles him further. The theater students prepare for their play.

title: A Wolf Is Born
overview: Haru and Legoshi's interaction ends extremely awkwardly. With two days to the performance, the school newspaper is sniffing out what Louis is hiding.

title: Give It Your All
overview: The drama club switches up parts after the last performance. Tapped to appear onstage, Legoshi confronts the new lead actor about a dangerous issue.

title: Two Sides to the Story
overview: Legoshi deals with misplaced notoriety after the chaotic but successful play, with Jack's support. Haru and Louis have a clandestine encounter.

title: Blurred Vision – Dream or Reality?
overview: After another murder, herbivores are confined to campus. Out in town, the theater club carnivores enter a shady district for adult meat eaters.

title: Below the Fur Coat
overview: The mystery of Legoshi's favorite lunch is solved. Haru recalls her first encounter with a vulnerable Louis, who has a fiancée.

title: Caught Like Floss in a Canine's Teeth
overview: Legoshi offers to escort Haru home; on the way she attempts to become better friends with him, unaware of his guilt. Juno has a revelation.

title: Into the Lion's Den
overview: Louis recalls his harrowing past, and Legoshi makes a personal vow despite conflicting feelings. Meanwhile, Haru is kidnapped for ransom by carnivores.

title: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
overview: Legoshi risks his life to find the Shishi-Gumi. A friend helps him channel and control his inner beast so that he can save Haru.

title: To the Neon District
overview: A ferocious Legoshi wreaks havoc to save Haru, while an unknown ally assists in their escape. Awkward timing causes some awkward situations afterward.

title: In the Storm's Wake
overview: Haru and Legoshi return to school after their strange night. As the festival gets underway, Juno challenges Haru for Legoshi's affections.

title: A Teen's Never-Ending Alarm
overview: Things are somewhat calm again, but with Tem's murder unsolved and Louis missing, the school is filled with rumors of hauntings and strange occurrences.

title: The Grey Police Hound Runs
overview: Rokume, a giant rattlesnake claiming to be the only security guard in the school, approaches Legoshi and asks him to track down the murderer.

title: Changes
overview: After taking a drastic step against the Shishi-Gumi, Louis faces an impossible choice. The drama club gets a new, very confident member.

title: Entangled
overview: Legoshi is attacked by a powerful carnivore. As Louis earns the trust of the Shishi-Gumi, he loses his own health and peace of mind.

title: Call It Like It Is
overview: While attending school during the day, Legoshi spends his nights in intense training sessions with Gohin.

title: Fly, O Corrupt One
overview: Louis wants to officially quit school to make a break with his past, but his father refuses to allow it. Haru and Legoshi talk things out.

title: Unforgettable Sweetness
overview: Tao — a black panther — accidentally injures another student. After Legoshi confronts them, the killer thinks back on how and why they murdered Tem.

title: Laughing at the Shadows We Cast
overview: After clapping a muzzle on Legoshi, Gohin orders him to capture a beast in the throes of a flesh addiction. Juno ends up spending some time with Haru.

title: A Busted Electric Fan
overview: Legoshi is shocked when he meets Louis in the Black Market district. At school, he's disgusted to hear Riz say he'll visit Kibi in the hospital.

title: The Chef's Suspense
overview: After Pina makes it clear he won't be intimidated by Riz, Legoshi gets into a bloody bare-knuckled fight with the bear.

title: Scatter Your Scales
overview: To grow stronger for his New Year's Day confrontation with Riz, Legoshi tries ingesting a moth larva and has an intense hallucination.

title: The Taste of Rebellion
overview: While getting pummeled by Riz, Legoshi realizes that they're not so different: he could easily have succumbed to his carnivorous instincts, too.

title: An Itchy Collar
overview: While Legoshi adjusts to a new life outside Cherryton, the school announces a new segregation policy. The current BEASTAR takes an interest in Legoshi.

title: The Shiny Black Nose Before Me
overview: Legoshi's meat withdrawal causes trouble with his new neighbor. The Shishi-Gumi's enigmatic new leader plans to distribute a dangerous energy drink.

title: An Old Dragon's Wrath
overview: Recalling Louis's words, Legoshi beats up the energy drink pushers. As the drama club makes a tough decision, the wolf finds a familiar face waiting.

title: The Gravity of Being a Land Dweller
overview: Gosha shocks his grandson with his fighting prowess. Yahya remembers his history with Gosha. Later, a kind seal teaches Legoshi about the marine world.

title: In the Food Chain
overview: After catching up with his old drama club friends, Legoshi meets with Yahya. Meanwhile, a cunning civet forces the Shishi-Gumi to work with him.

title: The Guy Born in Spring
overview: As Legoshi recovers under Gohin's care, Yahya investigates Melon, a gazelle therapist. Haru reaches a sobering conclusion on interspecies relationships.

title: Eat My Vow
overview: On a birthday date, Legoshi confesses everything to Haru. Determined to take their relationship seriously, she makes a daring and dangerous request.

title: What Lies at the End of the Melon Patch
overview: While the Black Market is abuzz with shocking rumors, Yahya makes plans to catch Melon. The 500 Cornered Rats continue their underground surveillance.

title: The Rotten Egg Hatches
overview: The drama club members chafe against the interspecies restrictions. Enticed by Yahya's promise, Legoshi infiltrates Melon's underground party.

title: Bambi Is Alive and Well
overview: Louis's investigations into the spiked energy drink take him back to the Black Market, where he runs into his old comrades — and their new leader.

title: Peeling Back the Layers
overview: Eager to learn more about the effects of Kines, Louis goes undercover and meets Deshico. Legoshi continues his investigation into Melon alone.

title: Tragedy on the Waves
overview: Unable to get a meeting with Yahya, Louis sneaks in. Meanwhile, Legoshi follows the clues from the tattoo parlor. Will he be able to find Melon?

title: A Threefold Dilemma
overview: After his showdown with Melon, Legoshi finds himself at the mercy of the ocean. Meanwhile, Haru encounters an unfortunate scene that rouses her suspicion.

title: Six Tails in a Row
overview: While the drama club tries to get their interspecies script approved, Melon's interest in Haru grows. Later, Legoshi reunites with his canine friends.

title: In a Dusty Universe
overview: Jack confides in Legoshi about his struggles in school, while Yahya visits Deshico for a lead. Melon's fascination with Haru takes a dangerous turn.

title: The Red in Our Lives
overview: Legoshi awakens with a start to find Haru missing. The mayor approaches Louis with a meaty proposition. Pina stirs up trouble during rehearsal.

title: Sweet Hunger
overview: Struggling to understand a herbivore's perspective, Juno seeks acting advice from Louis. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the Black Market alleys.

title: Upon a Nest of Dried Noodles
overview: A quick meal turns into a moral conflict for Bill. Meanwhile, a string of unexplained interspecies attacks erupt around the city. Louis and Haru catch up.

title: Feline Fall
overview: On the night of the Odd Soul Festival, Legoshi meets Melon in Haru's place, determined to stop him once and for all — but the villain pulls a gun on him.

title: Gotta Buy a Step Stool
overview: With Melon on the loose, Legoshi arms Haru with self-defense gear — but he has bigger things to worry about. There's a warrant out for his arrest!

title: The Demon King of Beasts
overview: After a charged encounter, Haru bonds with Gosha. Louis reveals his true feelings to his fiancée. Melon asserts his dominance over the Shishi-Gumi.

title: Words That Slipped Out
overview: Set on challenging Melon, Legoshi enters the Turf War, but must first pass a deadly quiz. Meanwhile, Deshico makes a critical discovery in his lab.

title: Blood in the Disco Ball
overview: Louis's butler reveals the truth behind Ogma's behavior. Meanwhile, Melon incites the crowd and a riot breaks out. Can Legoshi survive the night?

title: Interspecies Exchange
overview: Despite winning the Doku-Gumi's approval, Legoshi must still face the Inari-Gumi's foxy boss. The mayor drops a bombshell that blindsides Louis.
